content: Why is the healer at thr front???
When setting the loadout healer was at the 4th place
Left is always in the backrow
There are team that consist of putting the blue unit left
Because they can 1 vs 4 with specific wheels
You might have been confused by them

Also doesn't green heal?
The green i used didn't heal
Green is usually healer yes but depending on the situation they can also be DPS
Such as blue who are usually tanks
And red who are supposedly DPS, front
You see those examples with helot : catena, caecus, salvador
For the healer you might hve used Corposant right?
Horla is a sub DPS healer type kinda
But not good for that team
Cursed binding is kind of bad
And it's absolutely garbage without strike units related team
How do you see the changed cards
What do you mean by that?
Like mouchette's exault and all attacks were diff
And you can check the stats of the units
And the description of their kits + posse + wheel
We can do a friendly battle
You also have a mission related to it
You see the icon password battle?
I gtg rn will you be free like 2-2.5hour later
draft with no red, Xu really actually shows up
